content_en:
The Origin of Anger

Al-Hasan Al-Basry said: if you want to see a man, who has insight without being patient, you will find such a man, but if you see one, who has insight and is patient, this is the good one. Allah, the Almighty says,

which means, "And We made from among them (Children of Israel), leaders, giving guidance under Our Command, when they were patient and used to believe with certainty in Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.)." (As-Sajdah, 32:24)

That is why the soul is compared to fire in the speed it moves and in how it spoils what is around it. The soul takes anger and desire from the fire and Satan is created from fire.

87 Recorded by Abu Dawdd, book of manners, chapter on what is to be said at times of anger, no.4784.

AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 355

And it was recorded in the two sahih that two men abused each other in front of the Prophet and one of them became angry and his anger became so intense that his face became swollen and changed. The Prophet (peace be upon him) said, "I know a word the saying of which will cause him to relax if he Says it. If he says, ‘I seek refuge with Allah from Satan." And Allah says,

be BS SSN GG Wee Gul ell Os 2s 5 Stas

4B ALT AAS ge S) SL Jn 5S pba g. UE Uy ey which means, “Repel (the evil) with one which is better (i.e. Allah ordered the faithful believers to be patient at the time of anger, and to excuse those who treat them badly), then verily! He, between whom and you there was enmity, (will become) as though he was a close friend. But none is granted it (the above quality) except those who are patient, and none is granted it except the owner of the great portion (of the happiness in the Hereafter i.e. Paradise and in this world of a high moral character). And if an evil whisper from Shaitan (Satan) tries to turn you away (O Muhammad SAW) (from doing good, etc.), then seek refuge in Allah. Verily, He is the Ali-Hearer, the AllKnower.” (Fussilat, 41 134-36)

356 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings

And He, the Almighty says, raed wii? Fie ee Jeo. 5, 2h 4 ltt i) as ae clastll Ge SHER bly BD bet! ot Real ob Aw! dm >

which means, "Show forgiveness, enjoin what is good, and turn away from the foolish (i.e. don't punish them). And if an evil whisper comes to you from Shaitan (Satan) then seek refuge with Allah. Verily, He is All-Hearer, All-Knower." (Al-A'raf, 7:199200)

And He, the Almighty says,

which means, “Repel evil with that which is better. We are BestAcquainted with the things they utter. And say: "My Lord! 1 seek refuge with You from the whisperings (suggestions) of the Shayatin (devils). "And | seek refuge with You, My Lord! Lest they may attend (or come near) me." (Al-Mu'miniin, 23:96-98)
content_id:
Asal Mula Kemarahan

Al-Hasan Al-Basry berkata: jika engkau ingin melihat seseorang yang memiliki wawasan tanpa kesabaran, engkau akan menemukan orang semacam itu, tetapi jika engkau melihat seseorang yang memiliki wawasan dan juga sabar, inilah orang yang baik. Allah Yang Maha Kuasa berfirman,

yang artinya, "Dan Kami jadikan di antara mereka (Bani Israil) para pemimpin yang memberi petunjuk dengan perintah Kami, ketika mereka sabar dan mereka meyakini ayat-ayat Kami." (As-Sajdah, 32:24)

Itulah sebabnya jiwa diumpamakan dengan api dalam kecepatan geraknya dan dalam cara ia merusak apa yang ada di sekitarnya. Jiwa mengambil kemarahan dan hawa nafsu dari api, dan setan diciptakan dari api.

87 Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Dawud, kitab adab, bab tentang apa yang diucapkan saat marah, no. 4784.

AL-FAWA'ID: Kumpulan Kata-kata Bijak * 355

Dan diriwayatkan dalam dua kitab sahih bahwa dua orang saling mencaci di hadapan Nabi dan salah seorang dari mereka menjadi marah, dan kemarahannya begitu hebat sehingga wajahnya membengkak dan berubah. Nabi (shallallahu 'alaihi wa sallam) bersabda, "Aku mengetahui sebuah kalimat yang jika ia mengucapkannya akan membuatnya tenang. Jika ia mengucapkan, 'Aku berlindung kepada Allah dari setan.'" Dan Allah berfirman,

be BS SSN GG Wee Gul ell Os 2s 5 Stas

4B ALT AAS ge S) SL Jn 5S pba g. UE Uy ey yang artinya, "Tolaklah (kejahatan itu) dengan cara yang lebih baik (yaitu Allah memerintahkan orang-orang beriman untuk bersabar saat marah, dan memaafkan mereka yang memperlakukan mereka dengan buruk), maka tiba-tiba orang yang antaramu dan dia ada permusuhan, (akan menjadi) seolah-olah ia adalah teman yang sangat dekat. Tetapi sifat yang baik itu tidak diberikan kecuali kepada orang-orang yang sabar, dan tidak diberikan kecuali kepada orang-orang yang mempunyai keberuntungan yang besar (kebahagiaan di akhirat yaitu Surga dan di dunia berupa akhlak yang mulia). Dan jika bisikan jahat dari setan mengganggumu (wahai Muhammad SAW) (dari berbuat kebaikan, dll.), maka berlindunglah kepada Allah. Sesungguhnya Dialah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui." (Fussilat, 41:34-36)

356 * AL-FAWA'ID: Kumpulan Kata-kata Bijak

Dan Dia Yang Maha Kuasa berfirman, raed wii? Fie ee Jeo. 5, 2h 4 ltt i) as ae clastll Ge SHER bly BD bet! ot Real ob Aw! dm >

yang artinya, "Jadilah pemaaf dan suruhlah orang mengerjakan yang ma'ruf, serta berpalinglah dari orang-orang yang bodoh (yaitu jangan menghukum mereka). Dan jika datang kepadamu bisikan jahat dari setan, maka berlindunglah kepada Allah. Sesungguhnya Dia Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui." (Al-A'raf, 7:199-200)

Dan Dia Yang Maha Kuasa berfirman,

yang artinya, "Tolaklah kejahatan itu dengan cara yang lebih baik. Kami lebih mengetahui apa yang mereka sifatkan. Dan katakanlah: "Ya Tuhanku! Aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari bisikan-bisikan setan. Dan aku berlindung kepada-Mu, ya Tuhanku, agar mereka tidak mendekati aku." (Al-Mu'minun, 23:96-98)
content_ar: The Origin of الغضب Al-حسن Al-Basry said: إذا you want to see a man, who has insight without being patient, you will find such a man, but إذا you see one, who has insight and is patient, this is the الخير one. الله, the Almighty says, أي, "And We made from among them (الأولاد of Israel), leaders, giving الهداية under Our Command, عندما they were patient and used to believe with certainty in Our Ayat (proofs, evidences, الآيات, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.)." (As-السجدة, 32:24) That is why the النفس is compared to fire in the speed it moves and in how it spoils what is around it. The النفس takes الغضب and desire from the fire and الشيطان is created from fire. 87 Recorded by Abu Dawdd, الكتاب of الآداب, الباب on what is to be said at times of الغضب, no.4784. AL-FAWA'ID : A Collection of Wise Syaings * 355 And it was recorded in the two صحيح that two men abused بعضهم بعضاً in front of النبي ﷺ and one of them became angry and his الغضب became لذا intense that his face became swollen and changed. النبي ﷺ (ﷺ) said, "I know a word the saying of which will cause him to relax إذا he Says it. إذا he says, ‘I seek refuge with الله from الشيطان." And الله says, be BS SSN GG Wee Gul ell Os 2s 5 Stas 4B ALT AAS ge S) SL Jn 5S pba g. UE Uy ey أي, “Repel (the الشر) with one which is better (i.e. الله ordered the faithful المؤمنون to be patient at the time of الغضب, and to excuse those who treat them badly), then verily! He, between whom and you there was enmity, (will become) as though he was a close friend. But none is granted it (the above quality) except those who are patient, and none is granted it except the owner of the great portion (of the happiness in الآخرة i.e. الجنة and in this الدنيا of a high moral الأخلاق). And إذا an الشر whisper from Shaitan (الشيطان) tries to turn you away (O محمد ﷺ SAW) (from doing الخير, etc.), then seek refuge in الله. Verily, He is the علي-Hearer, the AllKnower.” (Fussilat, 41 134-36) 356 * AL-FAWA'ID: A Collection of Wise Sayings And He, the Almighty says, raed wii? Fie ee Jeo. 5, 2h 4 ltt i) as ae clastll Ge SHER bly BD bet! ot Real ob Aw! dm > أي, "Show المغفرة, enjoin what is الخير, and turn away from the foolish (i.e. don't punish them). And إذا an الشر whisper comes to you from Shaitan (الشيطان) then seek refuge with الله. Verily, He is All-Hearer, All-Knower." (Al-A'raf, 7:199200) And He, the Almighty says, أي, “Repel الشر with that which is better. We are BestAcquainted with the things they utter. And say: "My Lord! 1 seek refuge with You from the whisperings (suggestions) of the Shayatin (devils). "And | seek refuge with You, My Lord! Lest they may attend (or come near) me." (Al-Mu'miniin, 23:96-98)
